name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance Pueblo, Colorado — US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50,000 with same-day funding at their...
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical storefront at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, and provides online lending services for consumers in need of immediate cash. The company specializes in short-term lending products designed for borrowers who may have limited credit options or face urgent financial needs. They market themselves as welcoming all credit types and emphasize rapid approval and funding timelines.

The company offers multiple loan products including payday loans (up to $1,000), bad credit loans ($250-$50,000), same-day loans, cash advances, and personal loans for bad credit. All products are advertised as unsecured with no collateral requirement and minimal paperwork. Their stated process involves completing an online inquiry form, being connected with a third-party lender, reviewing the offer, signing a contract, and receiving cash. The Detroit location operates Monday-Friday 8am-9pm and Saturday-Sunday 10am-7pm.

US Cash Advance differentiates itself through personal service, emphasizing staff availability and transparent communication about repayment terms. Customer reviews highlight the speed of the in-person process (reportedly under 45 minutes) and staff member Doris's patient, no-pressure approach. The company claims no hidden fees and upfront term explanations. They position themselves as an option for borrowers with "less-than-perfect credit" when traditional lending channels are unavailable.

However, the company operates in the high-cost short-term lending space where APRs and fees are typically substantial, though specific rate information is not disclosed on the website. The mention of "low-interest payday loans" in one review conflicts with industry norms for this product category. The physical location has space constraints noted by customers. Some review content appears inconsistent or potentially inaccurate (one review references "Express Payday Loans" despite the company name being US Cash Advance), raising questions about review authenticity.
address: 1237 S Prairie Ave Suite 21, Pueblo, CO 81005

company_info.headquarters: 1237 S Prairie Ave Suite 21, Pueblo, CO 81005

pros: Same-day or quick funding available for qualified applicants
Accepts all credit types including bad credit applicants
Loans up to $50,000 available through bad credit product
No collateral required for any loan products
In-person service with reported fast processing (under 45 minutes)
Flexible use of funds with no stated restrictions
cons: APR and fee structure not disclosed on website, typical for payday lenders to charge 400%+ APR
Physical location has space and comfort limitations noted by customers
Unclear underwriting standards and lender network transparency
Some customer review authenticity concerns with inconsistent company names mentioned
Reliance on third-party lenders may create variable terms and borrower confusion
best_for: Consumers with bad or poor credit needing emergency cash in under 24 hours
Borrowers with urgent unexpected expenses who cannot access traditional bank loans
People who prefer in-person service and immediate interaction with lending staff
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for consumers in urgent financial crisis with poor credit who need same-day cash and prefer human interaction over fully digital processes. Primary caveat: this is high-cost short-term debt with undisclosed but industry-typical steep APRs and fees; borrowers should exhaust payday alternatives and non-profit credit counseling before pursuing these products.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit location
